description: Ebbinghaus-based persistent memory for Claude. Memories decay with time, strengthen on recall.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.sachitrafa/yourmemory

environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL connection string with pgvector. Example: postgresql://localhost:5432/yourmemory
environmentVariables.name: DATABASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Ollama server URL for local embeddings (nomic-embed-text) and classification (llama3.2:3b). Default: http://localhost:11434
environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_URL

environmentVariables.description: Ollama model used for fact/assumption classification. Default: llama3.2:3b
environmentVariables.name: EXTRACT_MODEL
